body: {"q": "TODO", "matches": [{"f": "README.md", "l": 43, "txt": "ffs grep '\\bTODO\\b' --root crates/"}, {"f": "crates/ffs-cli/src/commands/grep.rs", "l": 16, "txt": "  ffs grep TODO                            # smart-case literal search"}, {"f": "crates/ffs-core/src/bigram_query.rs", "l": 965, "txt": "            // 32. TODO|FIXME|HACK"}, {"f": "crates/ffs-core/src/directory_grep.rs", "l": 36, "txt": "/// let matches = grep_directory(Path::new(\"/tmp\"), r\"TODO\", 10);"}, {"f": "crates/ffs-core/src/file_picker.rs", "l": 1526, "txt": "    // TODO make this O(n)"}, {"f": "crates/ffs-core/src/mention/resolver.rs", "l": 188, "txt": "                    // TODO: extract fuzzy match indices from frizbee once we have access to them."}, {"f": "crates/ffs-mcp/src/main.rs", "l": 49, "txt": "    \"  x 'TODO.*#\\\\d+'               -> complex regex, use simple 'TODO' then filter visually\\n\","}, {"f": "crates/ffs-query-parser/src/config.rs", "l": 226, "txt": "        // AI agents use `*text*` to scope file searches (e.g. `*quote* TODO`)."}, {"f": "crates/ffs-query-parser/src/parser.rs", "l": 1124, "txt": "        let result = parser.parse(\"*quote* TODO\");"}, {"f": "demo/public/data/grep_RwLock.json", "l": 1, "txt": "{\"q\": \"RwLock\", \"matches\": [{\"f\": \"AGENTS.md\", \"l\": 69, \"txt\": \"- Be very careful around locking - prefer RwLock over Mutex for read-heavy workloads\"}"}], "total": 23}
